user.title: VTherm Progressive Fan
user.description: Link a Versatile Thermostat and its underlying climate entity.

data_description.current_temperature_sensor_entity_id: Smoothed room-temperature sensor to use as the room's current temperature — typically the same sensor VTherm regulates from (e.g. sensor.<room>_average_temperature). Leave empty to fall back to the underlying climate's own current_temperature, which is usually quantized to 0.5°F and can cause band flap.

fan_modes.title: Fan mode order
fan_modes.description:
Detected fan_modes on {climate_entity}: {detected_modes}

Select the fan modes to use for progressive control, in order from quietest to strongest. `auto` is reserved as the hand-back signal and is excluded automatically.

reconfigure.title: VTherm Progressive Fan — reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Change the linked entities. The next step lets you review the fan-mode order for the selected climate.

data_description.current_temperature_sensor_entity_id: Smoothed room-temperature sensor to use as the room's current temperature — typically the same sensor VTherm regulates from (e.g. sensor.<room>_average_temperature). Leave empty to fall back to the underlying climate's own current_temperature, which is usually quantized to 0.5°F and can cause band flap.

error.same_entity: The VTherm and the underlying climate cannot be the same entity.
error.no_modes_selected: Select at least one fan mode.
error.unknown_modes: One or more selected modes are not supported by the underlying climate entity.

init.title: VTherm Progressive Fan — options
init.description: Change the linked entities or reorder the fan modes.

data_description.current_temperature_sensor_entity_id: Smoothed room-temperature sensor to use as the room's current temperature — typically the same sensor VTherm regulates from (e.g. sensor.<room>_average_temperature). Leave empty to fall back to the underlying climate's own current_temperature, which is usually quantized to 0.5°F and can cause band flap.

error.same_entity: The VTherm and the underlying climate cannot be the same entity.
error.no_modes_selected: Select at least one fan mode.
error.unknown_modes: One or more selected modes are not supported by the underlying climate entity.
